scores.rationale: Severely inaccurate. Describes a man and deer, but frames show horses and KOA signage. Hallucinates a zoo/follow-the-leader game. Misidentifies all main subjects. Not useful for understanding actual content.

Accurate about horses and woods, but omits crucial opening content (KOA sign, grazing horses, pasture setting). Too vague and incomplete. Misses significant portions of the video sequence and context.

Accurate and covers main sequence: ranch sign, grazing horses, riding through woods, music. Appropriately concise. Mentions KOA implicitly via 'ranch sign.' Good structural overview, though lacks some detail about setting and atmosphere.

Highly accurate and comprehensive. Explicitly names KOA, describes sign details, grazing scene, wooded trail riding, and music. Provides context about camping/advertisement. Specific and useful. Slightly verbose but justified by detail level.
